---
title: "07. 治国之道"
subtitle: "Governance and Political Philosophy"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 7
categories: [tao-te-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How chapters 3, 17, 18, 19, 29, 30, 31, 46, 53, 57, 58, 59, 60, 61, 66, 69, 72, 74, 75, and 80 map governance onto fold-based minimal intervention and rate-distortion limits."
---

**Chapters:** 3, 17, 18, 19, 29, 30, 31, 46, 53, 57, 58, 59, 60, 61, 66, 69, 72, 74, 75, 80  
**Omega Directions:** `fold operator`, `rate-distortion`

{{< include articles/category_07_governance_statecraft.md >}}

---

[Back to Tao Te Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)

## Video & Media

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_07_governance_statecraft_video.mp4 >}}

**Downloads:**

- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_07_governance_statecraft_slides.pdf)
- [Video (MP4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_07_governance_statecraft_video.mp4)
- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_07_governance_statecraft_infographic.png)
